title: elho The Ocean Collection Round 18cm - Flower Pot Indoor - 100% Recycled - Made with Marine Waste - Green/Pacific Green
features: DURABLE | The pot is built for extensive and long-term use. The colour keeps well and it can handle a bit of dirt and rough handling; which is why you get a 3-year warranty.
RECYCLED PLASTIC | The Ocean Collection' flower pots are made from marine waste and plastic from the oceans, such as fishing nets, ropes, and dragnets.
EVERY POT IS UNIQUE | The maritime waste makes each flower pot unique and creates different colour tones and a stunning marble effect, that reflect the colour of the oceans.
MIX & MATCH | This pot is available in various colours and sizes that go together very nicely. This way, you can find the perfect pot for any interior and every plant.
THE PLANT IS READY TO POT | Thanks to the convenient shape and size, you can put the houseplant with interior pot directly into the pot.
